testcase.name: test_create_assessment
testcase.failure: tests/test_teacher_module_apis.py:468: in test_create_assessment assert response.status_code == 200, f"POST assessments failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: POST assessments failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"teacher_id":"3c374fbf-d8a3-461a-a97c-4b520bb32b38","name":"TEST: اختبار 014697","type":"quiz","class_id":"test-class-001","subject_id":"test-subject-001","max_score":100,"date":"2025-01-20"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","assessment_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"teacher_id":"3c374fbf-d8a3-461a-a97c-4b520bb32b38","name":"TEST: اختبار 014697","type":"quiz","class_id":"test-class-001","subject_id":"test-subject-001","max_score":100,"date":"2025-01-20"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
